meaning: adj.和蔼的,仁慈的,宽厚的,宽大的
examples: Lozano claimed that motorcycle driver Clement Lloyd was trying to run him down.
The land is fertile, the climate clement, water abundant.
According to Clement of Alexandria, Matthew was a vegetarian.
Mr. CLEMENT: Concretely they could put signs on the bulletin board next to the door.
Following Solicitor General Clement to the lectern was Joshua Rosenkranz representing the law schools.
